div.span:
📋 PHASE I
Identify Assets & MEFs
------------
• Mission Essential Functions
• Critical Systems
• Asset Inventory
• Asset Valuation

🔍 PHASE II
Identify Vulnerabilities
------------
• Security Weaknesses
• Configuration Issues
• Unpatched Systems
• Human Factors

⚠️ PHASE III
Identify Threats
------------
• Threat Actors
• Attack Vectors
• Likelihood/Probability
• Threat Intelligence

📊 PHASE IV
Analyze Business Impact
------------
Quantitative or Qualitative

Calculate Risk Metrics
------------
• SLE = Asset Value × EF
• ALE = SLE × ARO
• ROSI = (ALE - ALEm - Cost) / Cost

Risk Categories
------------
• Impact: Critical/High/Med/Low
• Likelihood: High/Med/Low
• Heat Map (Red/Yellow/Green)

ACCEPT
----
Risk within appetite
No action needed
Document decision

MITIGATE
----
Implement controls
Reduce likelihood/impact
Calculate Residual Risk

AVOID
----
Eliminate activity
Remove asset
Change process

📈 Continuous Monitoring
------------
• Track Risk Posture
• Review Controls
• Update Assessments
• Report to Stakeholders
